Agentic AI
  • Home
  • Agentic AI
Autonomous Execution
Why Choose Intellibyld
Agentic AI

Autonomous RFQ Generation

Our AI agents autonomously generate and dispatch RFQs to pre-qualified vendors, eliminating manual procurement bottlenecks.

01

Intelligent Bid Evaluation

Agentic workflows compare vendor bids against project specs, historical pricing, and delivery reliability in real time.

02

Shipment Orchestration

AI agents monitor shipments end-to-end, automatically rerouting or escalating when delays or exceptions arise.

03

Predictive Scheduling

Agents anticipate material needs weeks ahead by analysing project timelines, weather, and supplier lead times.

04

Exception Handling

When something goes wrong, agentic AI triages the issue, proposes alternatives, and executes the approved fix autonomously.

05

Continuous Learning

Every decision feeds back into the model, so the system gets smarter with each project your team delivers.

06
What We Provide
AI Agents That Execute
Construction Logistics
Autonomously

From RFQ generation to shipment tracking, our agentic AI
handles the heavy lifting so your team can focus on building.

Automated Procurement
Real-Time Decision Engine
Predictive Risk Alerts
Self-Healing Workflows
Multi-Agent Coordination
Human-in-the-Loop Control
FAQs
Frequently Asked Questions

automates construction supply chain workflows
and delivers autonomous execution.
